paper_title: The dependency of the δ18O discrepancy between ice cores and model simulations on the spatial model resolution

methods.description: This method describes the setup and execution of model simulations using COSMO_iso to evaluate the fractionating processes of stable water isotopes in Greenland. It involves downscaling outputs from the ECHAM5-wiso model and applying them to different spatial resolutions for both present-day and mid-Holocene periods.

steps.description: The nudged simulation outputs (standard and isotopic) from an isotope-enabled atmospheric model ECHAM5-wiso simulation are dynamically downscaled with COSMO_iso for the whole Arctic region.
steps.searchable_summary: downscale ECHAM5-wiso simulation outputs using COSMO_iso for Arctic region
outputs: COSMO_iso downscaled outputs for Arctic region

steps.description: The simulation outputs from ECHAM5-wiso are at a T106 horizontal spatial resolution (1.1° x 1.1°) and on 31 atmospheric vertical levels. The dynamical fields were nudged every 6 hours towards ERA-Interim reanalysis data.
steps.searchable_summary: nudge ECHAM5-wiso outputs towards ERA-Interim reanalysis data every 6 hours

steps.description: The spatial resolution of COSMO_iso is 0.44° x 0.44°, corresponding to 50 km x 50 km in rotated coordinates (COSMO_iso_50km).
steps.searchable_summary: set COSMO_iso spatial resolution to 0.44° x 0.44°

steps.description: The COSMO_iso_50km simulation is further downscaled to a spatial resolution of 0.0625° x 0.0625° for Greenland (COSMO_iso_7km).
steps.searchable_summary: downscale COSMO_iso_50km to 0.0625° x 0.0625° for Greenland

steps.description: In the COSMO_iso runs, the horizontal wind fields above the 850 hPa level are spectrally nudged towards the reanalysis-based dynamical fields of ECHAM5-wiso.
steps.searchable_summary: spectrally nudge horizontal wind fields above 850 hPa towards ECHAM5-wiso fields

steps.description: Atmospheric fields have been retrieved from a mid-Holocene simulation of the fully coupled model MPI-ESM-wiso.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve atmospheric fields from MPI-ESM-wiso mid-Holocene simulation

steps.description: With COSMO_iso, a representative time slice of 30 years is simulated for the mid-Holocene climate period.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate 30-year time slice for mid-Holocene using COSMO_iso

steps.description: The greenhouse gas concentrations and the orbital parameters are adapted according to the Paleoclimate Modelling Intercomparison Project 4 experiment design.
steps.searchable_summary: adapt greenhouse gas concentrations and orbital parameters for PMIP4
outputs: Adapted greenhouse gas concentrations and orbital parameters
